Note connected to the disappearance of Nancy Guthrie, mother of ‘Today’ show anchor Savannah Guthrie, said she had died - CNN
fullText: A note sent to media outlets connected to the disappearance of Nancy Guthrie, mother of NBC “Today” show anchor Savannah Guthrie, said she had died, multiple law enforcement sources briefed on the investigation told CNN.

text: Senate passes landmark housing affordability bill after bipartisan breakthrough - CBS News

text: Mystikal's Relationship with His Son is Strained Since Rape Conviction, Lawyer Says - TMZ
